name: Amulet of Mighty Fists +1
description: This amulet grants a +1 enhancement bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls with unarmed strikes and natural weapons.

name: Amulet of Mighty Fists +2
description: This amulet grants a +2 enhancement bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls with unarmed strikes and natural weapons.

name: Amulet of Mighty Fists +3
description: This amulet grants a +3 enhancement bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls with unarmed strikes and natural weapons.

name: Belt of Battle
description: This wide belt grants extra actions in combat. As a free action, spend charges (3 charges max, refreshes daily): 1 charge — gain 1 swift action; 2 charges — gain 1 move action; 3 charges — gain 1 full-round action.

name: Belt of Magnificence +4
description: This ornate belt grants a +4 enhancement bonus to all six ability scores.

name: Boots of Temporal Acceleration
description: These boots allow the wearer to experience a brief moment of accelerated time. Once per day as a free action, the wearer can spend a full-round action to gain an additional standard action that may be used immediately.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
description: These fur-lined boots protect the wearer from cold weather environments. The wearer can move at full speed across ice or snow, is protected from temperatures as low as -50°F, and gains endure elements (cold only) as a continuous effect.

name: Cloak of the Salamander
description: This fiery orange cloak grants the wearer fire resistance 10 and the ability to withstand even greater heat. Once per day the wearer can breathe a 30-foot cone of fire (5d6 damage, DC 16 Reflex half).

name: Flask of Curses
description: This stoppered flask releases a random curse when opened. Upon opening, roll d10: 1-2 Bestow Curse on opener, 3-4 Poison gas (DC 14 Fort, 1d4 Con/1d4 Con), 5-6 Shrink to Small size (1 hour), 7-8 Temporary blindness (1d4 rounds), 9-10 Permanent unluck (–2 on all saves for 1 day).

name: Flask of Endless Water
description: This flask contains an extradimensional reservoir of fresh water. It produces 2 gallons of clean drinking water per minute when unstoppered, refilling magically. The water can be used for drinking, cooking, or minor utility purposes.
